provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Rework the plan as vertical slices instead of five tests up front.
Tracer bullet first: one failing test for the first behavior, then the minimal implementation to pass it, proving the path end-to-end.
Then repeat per behavior: one failing test, then the minimal implementation, never batching tests ahead of code. The tracer bullet plus vertical slicing keeps each test grounded in real behavior.
